name: ai
description: Blaine Richardson's personal AI dev-team plugin, plus the superpowers and figma companions it relies on.

plugins.name: ai
plugins.description: Personal AI dev team: ten specialist agents (UX, frontend, backend, devops, architects, lead/staff engineers, PM) + shared engineering-principle skills.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Required companion: core skills library (brainstorming, writing-plans, TDD, code review) the ai agents build on.

plugins.name: figma
plugins.description: Required companion: official Figma MCP server. Gives the ux-designer agent write-to-canvas tools (use_figma, create_new_file, generate_figma_design) and the frontend-engineer Code Connect. Write-to-canvas needs a Figma Full seat on a paid plan.
